questions.label: True or false? When your app goes into the background, it's not guaranteed to be destroyed. It may only be stopping and waiting for the user to return to it.

indice.label: Index: When an app moves to the background, is it necessarily closed, or can it simply remain in memory, waiting to be used again?

questions.label: To keep the UI running smoothly, use ___ for long-running tasks, such as all database operations.
